measured_variance.note: per-question F1 is near-binary (mean comparator F1=0.314), so the per-question SD is very wide (~0.45) relative to the +0.03 pre-registered effect

projected_full_pass_usd_detail.price_assumption: gemini-3.1-pro @ $1.25/1M input + $5/1M output (documented in the artifact; proxy returns no price). Slice 20 adds a 5th arm (ppr-fusion) => x5/4.
projected_full_pass_usd_detail.headline: projected_full_pass_usd=27.54 is the MAX-FEASIBLE on-corpus full pass (whole >=3-hop answerable, 1165 Q); it is UNDERPOWERED (P(GO)~0.6<0.8) for the +0.03 effect. The power-target required N (1766-5000) EXCEEDS the corpus.

agent_verify_result: PASS (harness + cheap-validate + bounded priced pilot). THE BAR (pooled >=3-hop EM/F1): bm25 EM=0.250/F1=0.278 | passage_dense EM=0.325/F1=0.363 | fused(RRF k=60) EM=0.325/F1=0.376 | fused_rerank(comparator) EM=0.275/F1=0.314. Per-hop F1 fused_rerank: hop2(n=10)=0.390, hop3(n=26)=0.243, hop4(n=14)=0.446. Unanswerable confident-answer rate=0.10 all arms. CE reranker verified LIVE (RRF scores ~0.09 -> real CE scores 0.85/0.64/...; order differs on some questions; NOT silently identity). 16 tests green, pyright 0/0, 0 answerer errors in the pilot.
key_findings: COMPARATOR DOES NOT DOMINATE: the pre-registered fixed comparator fused_rerank (F1=0.314) UNDERPERFORMS plain fused (0.376) and passage_dense (0.363) on pooled >=3-hop. The CE cross-encoder helps single-passage relevance but demotes bridge passages multi-hop answering needs. The design FROZE fused_rerank as the comparator regardless (amendment 6); this is now an empirical caveat for Slice 20, not a spec change.

UNDERPOWERED FOR +0.03 ON-CORPUS (triggers design §0 reserved follow-on 1-4): measured sd_f1~0.45 => required N for P(GO)>=0.8 @ flat-positive+0.03 is ~1766 (analytic) to ~5000 (bootstrap percentile CI) at rho=0.5; even optimistic rho=0.7 needs 1200. The MuSiQue corpus has only 1165 answerable >=3-hop questions. Running the WHOLE >=3-hop corpus (max feasible) gives P(GO)~0.605 < 0.8. The pre-registered +0.03 effect is not detectable at adequate power on this corpus.

ENGINE DENSE ARM INERT IN THIS BUILD: the canonical .so carries default-reranker (CE live) but NOT test-hooks, and there is no production Python surface to register a node vector kind => _fathomdb_vector_kinds is empty => Engine.search returns a text-branch-only pool (zero doc vectors). Rebuilding with test-hooks would drop default-reranker (kill the comparator). Justified deviation (design-sanctioned): the dense + fused arms are built IN-HARNESS (pure-numpy bge-small-en-v1.5, the same pinned model); fused_rerank uses the LIVE engine CE over the full per-question pool (CE rerank is set-order-independent, so == 'fused pool re-ordered by CE'). Logged in m1_baseline.py module docstring + n_pool per question.
blockers_encountered: First N=100 priced pilot crashed on a single gemini-3.1-pro call exceeding the 120s urllib timeout (unhandled) -> whole run discarded, ~$0.95 lost. RESOLVED: run_baseline now degrades a failed/timed-out call to an abstention (counted), timeout raised to 240s; re-ran at N=60 cleanly (0 errors).

Exact slice-prompt model ids unavailable on the airlock proxy: gemini-3.1-pro-preview -> gemini-3.1-pro; gemini-2.5-flash-lite -> gemini-3.1-flash-lite (closest available; env-overridable via M1_STRONG_READER / M1_CHEAP_READER; mapping recorded in every artifact).

Power model bug caught + fixed POST-pilot (no priced cost): the initial ppr=clip(base+noise) form biased mean delta negative at large N (P(GO) fell toward 0). Corrected to model the paired difference directly; pilot power block regenerated via the $0 --recompute path. The buggy numbers were never reported as a verdict.
Pre-existing (NOT a Slice-5 regression): tests/test_ffi_safety.py errors at collection under this .so (needs native test-hooks absent from the default-reranker build); untouched by this slice.
next_step_for_orchestrator: harness + cheap-validate + bounded priced pilot COMMITTED on slice-0.8.2-5-20260618T154504Z @ 703752386f405937615d527b282fbf6e89fac573 (NOT merged — implementer respected the 'you do neither [cherry-pick]' boundary). (1) Run codex §9 review on the branch, then merge --no-ff onto LOCAL main. (2) FULL priced pass is GATED ON HITL: bring the budget block to HITL. The pre-registered +0.03 effect is UNDERPOWERED on-corpus (required N 1766-5000 >> 1165 available; max-feasible whole->=3-hop run = $27.54 at P(GO)~0.6). HITL must decide: (a) raise the detectable effect size (a larger true lift, e.g. +0.06, ~quarters the required N -> feasible), (b) accept the whole->=3-hop-corpus run (1165 Q, ~$27.54, P(GO)~0.6 acknowledged), or (c) redirect (design §0 reserved follow-on 1-4 = power re-estimate, exactly this case). Also flag for Slice 20: the CE comparator does NOT dominate fused/passage_dense on this corpus. (3) On go-ahead, the follow-on runs `python -m eval.m1_baseline_run --mode pilot --n-ge3 <N> ...` (or a full-corpus variant) -> runs/0.8.2-m1-baseline-n{N}.json (the runner enforces the N<=100 pilot cap; a full pass needs the cap lifted deliberately).
